newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q2 FY26 results (sales C$157.6M, -5% y/y; EPS C$0.15; Large Mould Mexico closure restructuring) were reported April 29, and a $0.105 dividend (June 30 pay) is routine - all pre-window. The -2.9% move is noise.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-node lens: die-casting/extrusion tooling optionality into AI thermal housings/reshoring is unchanged. Q2 (auto-exposed, sales -5%) and dividend are pre-window; no new AI-chain evidence. Rank 31 holds.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Reshoring tooling demand; H2 mold-program ramp post-restructuring
verdicts.primaryRisk: Auto-cyclical demand and FX drag; AI-thermal link remains speculative
verdicts.bull: Restructuring (Mexico closure) should lift H2 margins; cheap tooling/components play with reshoring optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Auto-tied cyclical with only a tenuous AI-thermal angle; sales declining.
verdicts.bear: No real AI revenue; auto end-market softness and FX continue to pressure the top line.
